name: Nightmare | The Creation That Hates
description:
[ʇɹ∀ ï̸̢̘̮̗͂͐͆s̸̻͍͇͎̹̮̋̽͛̈̈̽͝͝ Ⓑⓨ: e-01]

Pokémon Amalgamation created painfully by humans, now hates them.

A experiment gone awry and spurred hateful, vengeful life.

Technically, her name is actually abominaceon, but I felt “Nightmare” was a greater name.

Experiment One - The Eeveelutions.

Time: 16:25.

Everything seems to be going smoothly. We currently have the creature contained - under a strong sedative. It is very aggressive, and easily provoked. When we are done with our research, we will put it down, as no such creature should exist in nature.

E̴̡͖̹͎͙̋̈́̉̀̃͘͝n̸̫̥̝̞̪̫̫̾̆́͒̓̕d̵̼̙̍̇͂́̂̅ ̵̛̳̞̼̱̮̥̇͊̏̿́̂͘͠ǒ̴̡̼̲̗̙̳̳̼f̸͇͎̙̟͕̅̆ ̵̢͎̼̖͐͌͋̄̾̆̈̓̎͠l̵̖̮̮͖͎̬̘̯̄̈o̷̧̧̠͖̜͉̹̦̜͒̿g̵̬̰̰̦̙͙̼͂͛̈́͊͌̈́̔̈͠.̵̧̰͌͘
